# OpenTwins - Complete Reference

> Autonomous digital twins for social platform engagement. Open source, runs locally, MIT licensed.

## Overview

OpenTwins is a Node.js CLI tool that deploys AI-powered agents across 10 social media platforms. Each agent uses Claude (via Claude Code CLI) as its AI brain with built-in Chrome CDP browser automation. Agents engage authentically - commenting, posting, reacting and building connections - using the user's configured identity, voice and content strategy.

The tool runs entirely on the user's machine. No cloud service is involved. Credentials and session cookies stay local.

## Supported platforms

1. LinkedIn - comments, posts, articles, polls, connection requests, reactions
2. Twitter/X - tweets, replies, threads, quote tweets, articles
3. Reddit - comments, posts, upvotes, karma building
4. Bluesky - posts, comments, quotes
5. Threads - posts, comments, quotes
6. Medium - responses, claps, articles
7. Substack - comments, notes, newsletters, restacks
8. Dev.to - articles, comments, reactions
9. Product Hunt - comments, upvotes, launches
10. Indie Hackers - posts, comments, discussions

## Architecture

```
~/.opentwins/
  config.json          - identity, platforms, voice, schedule settings
  data.db              - SQLite database for activity tracking and quality metrics
  workspaces/
    agent-{platform}/  - per-agent workspace with HEARTBEAT.md, schedule, memory
  browser-profiles/    - profile markers for configured platforms
  locks/               - agent run lock files
```

### Agent execution flow

1. Scheduler triggers agent heartbeat (hourly during active hours)
2. `runClaudeAgent()` spawns `claude -p` with the agent's HEARTBEAT.md prompt
3. Claude reads the schedule, picks the current task, and executes it
4. Browser automation via `opentwins browser` CLI commands (open, navigate, evaluate, click)
5. Agent writes results to memory files and updates limits.json
6. Session JSONL is saved to `~/.claude/projects/` for activity tracking

### Content pipeline (7 stages, daily)

1. Trend Scout - predicts trending topics
2. Competitive Intel - monitors competitor activity
3. Engagement Tracker - tracks post performance
4. Network Mapper - maps engagement targets
5. Amplification - identifies content to amplify
6. Content Planner - generates daily brief
7. Content Writer - creates platform-specific content

## Configuration

### Identity fields
- name, display_name, role, headline, bio, brand_tagline
- certifications, conference_mentions, experience_hooks
- content pillars (topics the agent engages on)

### Voice settings
- formality: casual | balanced | professional
- style_ratios: questions, statements, reactions, trailing (percentages)
- disagree_target_pct: target disagreement rate (default 25%)
- max_word_count: per-comment word limit (default 80)
- brand_mention_every_n: how often to mention brand (default every 5 comments)

### Safety controls
- Daily rate limits per action type (comments, reactions, posts)
- Weekly rate limits (articles, connection requests, polls)
- Active hours window (default 8:00-23:00)
- Banned phrases list
- Platform-specific API keys where required

### Authentication
- Claude Code subscription (OAuth token via `claude setup-token`)
- Anthropic API key (from console.anthropic.com)

## Web dashboard

Served at localhost:3847 via `opentwins ui` or `opentwins start --ui`.

### Tabs

**Command** - Mission control
- KPI cards: agents enabled, runs today, tool calls, automation status
- Platform agent cards with status, actions, next run time
- Recent runs table (clickable, links to Activity)
- Content pipeline flow visualization

**Agents** - Per-agent management
- Hero panel with run/stop controls, status badge
- Quick stats: today's actions, tasks done, last run, workspace status
- Browser setup button (launches Chrome for login)
- Limits with progress bars (daily/weekly, editable)
- Behavior tuning: style mix bars, parameters
- Today's schedule with task progress
- Live activity feed from latest Claude session (auto-polls when running)

**Activity** - Session explorer
- Sessions grouped by run, filterable by platform and date
- Each session expandable to show full event feed
- Events: thinking (blue), tool calls (white), errors (red), done (green)
- Event kind filter chips (all/thinking/tool/error)
- Clickable from Dashboard recent runs (deep links with auto-expand)

**Usage** - Cost tracking
- KPI cards: estimated cost, output tokens, cache hit rate, errors
- Daily cost bar chart
- Daily output token chart
- Error trend line chart
- Cost breakdown by category (output/cache write/cache read/input)
- Per-platform breakdown table
- Monthly projection with subscription caveat

**Quality** - Voice monitoring
- Today's snapshot: comments, avg words, disagree %, em-dash violations
- Health-colored KPI cards (green/amber/red based on targets)
- Trend charts over 7/14/30 days: volume, disagreement rate, word density
- Style distribution pie chart
- Platform and timeframe filters

**Config** - Settings editor
- Identity: name, role, headline, bio, tagline
- Professional context: certifications, conferences, experience hooks (as tag chips)
- Content pillars: editable card grid
- Voice: formality segmented control, language
- Schedule: timezone, active hours with hour pickers, pipeline toggle
- Saving regenerates all agent template files

### Health monitoring
- Always-visible status pills in top nav bar
- Browser health: checks Chrome CDP ports for active profiles
- Claude status: fetches status.claude.com API, cached 60s server-side
- When gateway is down: agent actions disabled, warning banner shown

## CLI commands

```
opentwins init              - launch web setup wizard (default)
opentwins init --cli        - interactive CLI setup (headless fallback)
opentwins init --force      - overwrite existing config
opentwins start             - start agent scheduler
opentwins start --ui        - start scheduler + web dashboard
opentwins stop              - stop daemon
opentwins run <platform>    - run single agent manually
opentwins run pipeline      - run content pipeline
opentwins ui                - start dashboard only
opentwins browser setup <p> - create browser profile + login
opentwins browser login <p> - re-login to existing profile
opentwins browser health    - check all browser sessions
opentwins browser list      - list configured profiles
opentwins logs <platform>   - view today's activity log
```

## Dependencies

- Node.js 18+
- Claude Code CLI (`npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code`)
- Claude Code subscription or Anthropic API key

## Links

- Repository: https://github.com/Open-Twin/opentwins
- Issues: https://github.com/Open-Twin/opentwins/issues
